articles.title: I spent a month with the Onn 4K Pro (2026), and now the Google TV Streamer seems pointless - Android Authority
articles.description: The Onn 4K Pro (2026) promises to deliver a flagship Google TV experience for just $60. But is it any good? Yeah, it is.
articles.content:
Its 2026, and youre in the market for a Google TV streaming device. Whats a person to get?

articles.title: What is the Nex Playground console, how much is it and when is it out in the UK? - BBC
articles.description: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
articles.content: Instead, David Lee, chief executive of US technology firm Nex, says its cube-shaped machine, the Nex Playground, is designed to get children moving.
